channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A third of the Congressional Black Caucus could lose seats amid redistricting fight
item.description: Up to 19 members of the Congressional Black Caucus, nearly a third of its membership, face potential seat loss through the 2028 cycle.

item.title: Man who faced execution three times released on bond
item.description: Former Oklahoma death row inmate Richard Glossip was freed on bond after nearly 30 years in prison.

item.title: Ebola outbreak in Congo kills dozens, Africa CDC says
item.description: A new Ebola outbreak in a remote Congo province has resulted in 65 deaths and 246 suspected cases, according to Africa CDC.

item.title: Search in Maldives waters after five Italians killed in cave dive accident
item.description: An Italian expert joined police divers and rescue vessels in the Maldives searching after five Italian divers died in a scuba accident.
